mood_board_direction: CRMaster blends the clinical precision of a Swiss-style layout with the premium, tactile feel of glassmorphism in Light Mode, and transitions into a moody, cinematic Luxury archetype with subtle neon highlights in Dark Mode. The design is data-dense yet breathable, using 'Electric Indigo' as the primary accent to drive focus. The goal is to make a standard B2B tool feel like an elite, high-performance financial terminal. Glass effects create depth without sacrificing legibility, while the neon glow in dark mode acts as a functional affordance rather than pure decoration.

sidebar.nav_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200
sidebar.nav_item_active_dark: bg-accent/10 text-accent font-medium border border-accent/20 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.2)]
sidebar.user_profile_card: mt-auto p-4 border-t border-border bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-md

topbar.layout: h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b z-50 sticky top-0

table_rows.layout: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border hover:bg-surface/50 transition-colors group

pills_and_badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
pills_and_badges.status_light: soft pastel background with matching darker text
pills_and_badges.status_dark: transparent background, 1px solid border matching status color, text matching status color, subtle glowing box-shadow
pills_and_badges.market_app_pills: rounded-md px-2 py-1 bg-surface border border-border text-xs

buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-surface border border-border hover:bg-accent/5 transition-all

search_bar.input: w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent
search_bar.icon: absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted-foreground w-4 h-4

potansiyel_indicator.ring_gauge: w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 border-border relative
potansiyel_indicator.arc_fill: absolute inset-0 rounded-full border-2 border-transparent border-t-accent border-r-accent transform rotate-45

mobile.table: hidden, show responsive card view instead

implementation_roadmap.step_1: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css with the new CSS variables for light and dark modes.
implementation_roadmap.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js to map custom colors to the CSS variables and add custom shadows.
implementation_roadmap.step_3: Implement ThemeProvider context to handle light/dark mode toggling globally.
implementation_roadmap.step_4: Build Layout wrapper (Sidebar + Topbar with Theme Toggle) utilizing glassmorphism classes.
implementation_roadmap.step_5: Refactor Dashboard page: style react-grid-layout items with neon borders in dark mode and glass in light mode. Integrate Recharts with CSS variable colors.
implementation_roadmap.step_6: Refactor Customers page: create the new table row layout, implement Potansiyel ring gauges, and build status pills (pastel for light, glowing outline for dark).

images.description: Professional male avatar for customer row
Professional female avatar for customer row
Abstract 3D frosted glass shape background for Light Mode Hero Stat Card
Abstract 3D glowing shape background for Dark Mode Hero Stat Card

data_testid_rules.instruction: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid="theme-toggle-button"`, `data-testid="customer-row-edit-action"`).
